free_text: Experimental cross section for charged particle
production of the therapeutic radionuclide 111Ag and
CGR 560 cyclotron of the VUB, Belgium
The samples were elemental high purity natural Pd foils
used. Two stacks were irradiated with 20.5 and 15.1 MeV
deuterons and three stacks with protons at 37.3, 28.5,
and 15.9 MeV. The thickness of the foils was determined
by weighing the original metal sheet. High purity Ti,
Cu and Ni monitor foils were inserted in to the stacks.
Beam current was measured in Faraday cup and checked
by monitor reactions. (200nA for 0.5 h). Activity was
measured without chemical separation. The beam energy
was determined by TOF. The energy degradation was
calculated by using the polynomial approximation of
Andersen (see REL-REF). Nuclear data were taken from
degradation was calculated using tables from this
OS. Reaction coding in Subents 8,9 modified
SD: REACTION code updated according to new
EXFOR rules in Subents 006-007.  REL-REF updated. Small
The uncertainty of the primary beam 0.2 MeV.
Total errors were given. Correction of the beam
was made using the monitor reactions.
